zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanne Griffith於1404年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素時，她的父親William Reynald Griffith22歲，母親Joan Raynald-64歲。她於1434年與Jenkin Oakley在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1468年在英國史洛普爾享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Joanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanne Griffith was born in 1404, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Reynald Griffith, was 22 and her mother, Joan Raynald, was -64. She married Jenkin Oakley in 1434, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1468, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 64.

Elle a épousé Jenkin Oakley en 1434, à Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1468, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanne Griffithが1404年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアビショプ'ス カストルで生まれた時，父William Reynald Griffithは22歳，母Joan Raynaldは-64歳であった。1434年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアビショプ'ス カストルでJenkin Oakleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1468年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanne Griffith(이)가 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Reynald Griffith(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Raynald(은)는 -64세였다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 Jenkin Oakley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 영국 슈럽실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanne Griffith родилась в 1404 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Reynald Griffith было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Raynald, -64. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jenkin Oakley в 1434 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1468 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.
